error_signature: received file with Mime Type: application/octet-stream
title: Telegram Get File returns incorrect MIME type
symptom: The Telegram Get File node returns a file with Mime Type: application/octet-stream instead of the expected binary file type, preventing further processing.
applies_when: Expecting a binary file for processing
not_this_if: File is processed correctly by other nodes
Different file types are handled properly
root_cause: The Telegram Get File node may not automatically convert the MIME type of the downloaded file, resulting in a generic application/octet-stream type that is not suitable for processing by subsequent nodes.
fix_steps: Attach a 'Get Information' node to the output of the Telegram Get File node
Configure the 'Get Information' node to convert the MIME type to the correct one
Proceed with the Base LLM module for processing
agent_instruction: Use a 'Get Information' node to convert the MIME type after the Telegram Get File node.
